title.en: Therefore, this level tests the strength of wil...

content.en:
"The Grey Mist!"

Ye Tian looked at the long river of gray mist in front of him, and did not try to fly over, but silently comprehended the mystery in it.

As time passed, Ye Tian gradually learned a little clue in the long river of gray mist.

This gray mist river is not the same as the gray mist treacherous bridge, the gray mist trick bridge tests the mastery of the innate eternal rules, and the gray mist river tests not the innate eternal rules, but the bias to the will.

When passing through the long river of gray mist, if you are weak-willed, you will be affected by the long river of gray mist, and you will fall into the long river of gray mist.

Therefore, this level tests the strength of willpower.

The will of those Realm Legendary Lords and Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords has actually reached the fifth-order Eternal Will, and the will of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords is extremely strong, and it stands to reason that they should be able to pass through the Gray Mist, but in fact, there is a difference between the fifth-order Eternal Will and the fifth-order Eternal Will.

Some Legendary Lords just blindly enhance the Eternal Will and use various resources to enhance the will power, but these willpower are very fragile, while some Fourth-Order Eternal Will is the Fourth-Order Eternal Will that has been tempered and tempered thousands of times, and to some extent, the tenacity of the will is comparable to those Fifth-Order Wills.

For example, this long river of gray mist, the legendary lord of the 117 transcendent realm cannot pass through, there is no doubt that there is a flaw in the will, and only by making up for the flaws can you pass through the long river of gray mist.

Ye Tian felt that his will was extremely tenacious and stable, but his will had not reached the fifth order, and there was almost no hope of passing through the long river of gray mist.

For now, he must raise his will to the fifth order of eternal will as soon as possible before he can pass through the long river of gray mist.

But where is the eternal will so easy to promote, it must take a long time.

While others were thinking hard about how to get through the long river of gray mist, Ye Tian was thinking about the role of the long river of gray mist.

The Gray Mist Bridge has the effect of improving the innate eternal rules and many eternal paths, and the Gray Mist River must have great benefits, it is not just a level.

"Before, at the level of the Gray Mist Bridge, you had to enter it to understand the benefits, could it be that this long river of gray fog also has to enter the long river of gray fog before you can understand the benefits?" Ye Tian guessed.

But before that, other legendary lords also fell into the long river of gray mist, and they paid a lot of money to break free, and if they didn't come out for a long time, they would inevitably fall.

Even the Transcendent Realm Lord didn't dare to enter the Grey Mist River, he was only now a Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm, could he survive the Grey Mist?

"No, the Gray Mist River is aimed at the will, if the will of the Transcendence Realm is not strong, it is not much better than the Realm Realm Legendary Lord in resisting the power attack of the Gray Mist River. And my will is actually very strong, even if it is only the fourth order, but I still have the Gray Mist Battle Armor, C I have comprehended the Gray Mist Eternal Dao, and I really hope to hold on for a long time in the Gray Mist Long Mine. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, if he tried, he would be taking a big risk, and once he really couldn't break free, causing this replica body to fall here, the Gray Mist Armor might fall to the bottom of the Gray Mist Hit River, and it would be difficult to retrieve it.

"Take a gamble!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, Ye Tian rushed towards the long river of gray mist

"Endless Lord, be careful!"

Other Legendary Lords reminded.

I saw that not long after Ye Tian flew into the Gray Mist River, his body fell into the Gray Mist River uncontrollably

Soon, he was submerged in the gray mist.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian did not rush out of the long river of gray mist.

At this time, a transcendent realm lord sighed and said, "I'm afraid that this doppelganger of the Endless Lord has fallen into the Gray Mist River.

"The Endless Lord is too impulsive, even the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord is difficult to break through the Gray Mist, he is just a Perfection Realm Legendary Lord, he shouldn't go over, it's not bad to give up directly!"

What they didn't know was that Ye Tian's replica body did not fall, but persisted under the long river of gray mist.

It's just that the Gray Mist River imprisoned the will of the Legendary Lord, and it was difficult for the will to probe under the Gray Mist River, so they didn't know Ye Tian's situation.

------------------

One force after another invaded Ye Tian's body, impacting his will and body.

At this time, Ye Tian's Gray Mist Eternal Dao combined with the Gray Mist Battle Armor had an effect, causing him to be able to persist here.

Under the impact of the power of the Gray Mist River, Ye Tian was able to discover the weakness of his will, and the Long River of Gray Mist impacted his will again and again, which was equivalent to refining his will and beating his will at all times.

As long as he can persevere, his will will increase at a terrifying speed, and this improvement is not a vain improvement, but a real refinement, and it is as strong as billions of pounds and tempering.

"It turns out that this is the real benefit of the Gray Mist River, this mysterious powerhouse who established the Gray Mist Bridge and the Gray Mist River should be an eternal master, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian gradually couldn't hold on a little, if he was an ordinary person, I am afraid that he would only find a way to leave the Gray Mist River, and then slowly recover from his injuries, and then enter the Gray Mist River to cultivate after the injuries are intact.

And Ye Tian didn't need to do this, he directly copied a complete replica body, and immediately transferred the gray mist battle armor to the newly copied replica body, so that he could continue to hold on for a long time.

In this way, Ye Tian worked hard to temper his will in the long river of gray mist.

As time passed, his will not only grew stronger, but also became more and more refined and stable.

And he is also opening up one will world after another, and these will worlds surround the sea of will sources, so that his will has been improved to a certain extent.

Finally, after nearly ten thousand years of penance, Ye Tian's will reached the limit of the fourth-order will

this day.

Ye Tian's will ushered in a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

The fourth-order Eternal Will is transforming into the Fifth-Order Eternal Will, and this time the transformation is a truly huge transformation, and the willpower is constantly soaring, and even the Will Source Sea is expanding.

After a long time, the transformation ended, and Ye Tian's willpower increased nearly a hundredfold in terms of quantity, and each Xing's will became stronger, more pure and powerful.

After the will was transformed to the fifth-order will, and with the gray mist battle armor, Ye Tian felt that he could easily break through the long river of gray mist.

"It's time to get out of the Grey Mist!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he will leave a copy body to continue refining his will in this level, and the other copy body will go to the next level through the long river of gray mist. _
